generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlValves : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system valves for zone-specific temperature regulation in the BIM-based Living Lab facility, controlled via BIM-centric TwinLight framework"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

instance LightingDimmers : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting dimmers deployed in building zones, configured through reinforcement learning in BOREALIS for energy-efficient operation"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensorZone1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor in Zone 1 of the Living Lab facility, detecting human presence for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

instance TemperatureSensorZone1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in Zone 1 measuring ambient air temperature for HVAC system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

instance HumiditySensorZone1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor in Zone 1 monitoring relative humidity levels for indoor comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

instance LightIntensitySensorZone1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor in Zone 1 measuring natural/artificial lighting levels for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

instance PostOccupancyEnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter tracking power usage metrics from Zone 1 for life-cycle analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZone1Environment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZone1Environment
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataZone1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensorZone1
]

instance TemperatureDataZone1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorZone1
]

instance HumidityDataZone1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensorZone1
]

instance LightIntensityDataZone1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensorZone1
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataZone1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyEnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model of the Living Lab facility serving as the semantic backbone for the Digital Twin, containing structural and functional geometry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance RuntimeBIMMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from BIM models containing sensor configurations, control logic, and domain-specific parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance OperationalMetricsDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic operational metrics database storing real-time sensor data (temperature, humidity, occupancy) and post-occupancy performance data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataZone1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISReinforcementLearning
]

instance BIMControlFramework : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework containing domain-specific logic for bidirectional control between DT and physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightFramework
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange middleware using Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocol for bidirectional communication between physical sensors and Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealtimeDataStreamingService
    DTDFVocab:enables ClosedLoopControlService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine platform for interactive 3D visualization of the Digital Twin, enabling real-time monitoring and performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveSimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated model-driven engineering pipeline transforming BIM models into runtime artifacts through standardized extension points for modular service integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework in BOREALIS for adaptive control policies (e.g., energy optimization, lighting adjustment) based on operational data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OperationalMetricsDatabase
]

instance TwinLightFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework implementing domain-specific logic for bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BuildingControlValves
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingDimmers
]

// C6: Services
instance RealtimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming service continuously transmitting physical sensor data (temperature, humidity, occupancy) from BOREALIS to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsDashboard
    DTDFVocab:enables EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance ClosedLoopControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Closed-loop control service implementing reinforcement learning-based adjustments (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC tuning) based on real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedControlAdjustments
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimization
    DTDFVocab:enables BOREALISReinforcementLearning
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive simulation service enabling 3D visualization through Unreal Engine for performance analysis, occupancy pattern visualization, and real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualPerformanceAnalysis
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework allowing DT Engineers to extend functionality via standardized extension points (e.g., custom analytics, new control algorithms)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ExtensibleAnalytics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalMetricsDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying energy efficiency metrics, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, light intensity) for life-cycle monitoring"
]

instance AutomatedControlAdjustments : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control adjustments executed via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS, including adaptive lighting dimming based on occupancy and natural light conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Performance optimization service applying BOREALIS RL-based tuning to HVAC systems, lighting controls, and energy consumption patterns for continuous improvement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualPerformanceAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization analysis through Unreal Engine showing building performance metrics, occupancy distribution, and real-time operational conditions"
]

instance ExtensibleAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Custom analytics service framework enabling DT Engineers to implement domain-specific algorithms (e.g., predictive maintenance, anomaly detection) via modular extension points"
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingZone1Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensorZone1
    base:contains TemperatureSensorZone1
    base:contains HumiditySensorZone1
    base:contains LightIntensitySensorZone1
    base:contains PostOccupancyEnergyMeter
    base:contains BuildingControlValves
    base:contains LightingDimmers
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Generated via the DT framework’s **runtime interfaces**, where control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) are transmitted back to physical actuators. This is enabled by the BIM-based control configuration layer (TwinLight) and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-realtime scale**, with synchronization rates determined by sensor sampling frequencies (e.g., 1-second updates for lighting control in BOREALIS). The framework ensures low-latency data exchange via optimized middleware (Hono/Ditto) for seamless DT-PT alignment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **service-oriented architecture** where BIM models, middleware (Hono/Ditto), visualization (Unreal Engine), and custom services (DT Engineers) interact via standardized APIs. The constellation supports scalability from single-zone to full-building DTs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building life cycle**, from **design phase** (BIM models), **construction phase** (device modeling), to **operation phase** (real-time monitoring and adaptive control). The DT evolves dynamically via runtime configuration management (e.g., BOREALIS’ iterative control policy updates)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, ensuring alignment between DT and physical building. Validation involves **verification of BIM-to-DT transformations** and **real-time data synchronization accuracy** (e.g., post-occupancy sensor drift management)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Established via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, enabling **MQTT-based real-time communication** between physical sensors/actuators and DT components. Protocols support bidirectional data flows with low latency, critical for closed-loop control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, cloud-native service** leveraging standardized extension points for modular hosting. The framework integrates with existing AECO tools (e.g., BIM platforms) via automated transformations, ensuring compatibility with legacy systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to integrate with **external BIM systems** (e.g., via standardized APIs) and **IoT platforms** (e.g., sensor networks) for broader AECO ecosystem collaboration."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly addressed in the documents, but inferred to follow **AECO data governance standards**, where BIM models may be owned by stakeholders, while operational data (e.g., sensor logs) could be managed by DT service providers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Relies on **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for semantic consistency and **open middleware protocols** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperability. Standardized extension points ensure modularity and future extensibility."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Lacks explicit details on security measures, but implied to include **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto) and **safety validation** (e.g., remote control of physical actuators must comply with operational safety guidelines)."
]
